tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing
I Dont Want To Talk About It

content:
PRICE OF LOVE
Bad English

Credit due to Javier Raul Ausecha Bucheli

[Intro]
  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 
  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
 
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Girl, sometimes it seems to me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                  
  That I don't say the things I should[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
  To you, I act like I'm no good[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch] 
  And you wait for me patiently[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                  
  This house is not a home without you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
  It takes two hearts to share[/tab]

[Refrain I]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] 
  Your eyes will always see through me [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
  And bring me to my knees[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
  And I will always turn to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] 
  You're everything I need[/tab]

[Chorus I]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch] 
  And through the good and bad times[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
  You have always been there[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]               
  We hold each other close/tight[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
  You tell me it's alright[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch] 
  The nights we fight about it[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  Never dream of giving up[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  That's the price of love[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Look, sometimes it makes us cry[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  
  Forgive me when I get it wrong[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
  Sometimes it's hard to be that strong[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
  And oh, I would do anything[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  
  For you I'd turn the stars around[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
  I'd find a way somehow[/tab]

[Refrain II]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch] 
  This time, you see I built [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
  A bridge to you again[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
  Love shines, we'll sweep away the past[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch] 
  We're more than lovers, more than [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
        friends[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
